findings.name: aura_faithfulness
findings.question: Does Aura STT preserve a child's reading errors?
findings.result: MIXED, 2 real-word miscue(s) preserved, 1 non-word (emphatic) miscue(s) normalized toward the nearest valid word

details.target: ذهب الولد إلى المدرسة في الصباح
details.misread_spoken: ذهب الورد إلى المدرصة في المساء
details.transcript: ذَهَبَ الوَردُ إلى المَدرَسَةِ في المَساء

findings.recommendation: Offer a verbatim / disabled-LM STT mode + per-word confidence so phonetic and emphatic miscues (ص↔س, ض↔د, ط↔ت) survive for reading assessment.

findings.name: aura_child_pitch
findings.question: How does Aura STT handle higher-pitched, child-like speech?
findings.result: Aura round-trips clear synthetic speech well across pitches (accuracy spread 0.0 pts). True child speech (higher F0 + disfluency) was NOT available to test.

details.sentence: العصفور الصغير يطير بسرعة فوق الشجرة

per_voice.transcript: العُصفورُ الصَغيرُ يَطيرُ بِسُرعَةٍ فَوقَ الشَجَرَه
العُصفورُ الصَغيرُ يَطيرُ بِسُرعَةٍ فَوقَ الشَجَرَه

details.caveat: Proxy via TTS voices; no real 6-8yo recordings were available.

findings.recommendation: Publish Aura accuracy on a children's speech set (high F0, disfluencies, invented words); add per-word confidence to flag low-confidence child audio.

findings.name: diwan_age_appropriateness
findings.question: Was the Diwan/Fanar verse age-appropriate for a 6-8 year old?
findings.result: Verse generated in 16 words; FanarGuard safety 4.54, judge reading_level easy, appropriate=True

details.verse:
صاحَ العصفُورُ في الصباحِ  
وصوتهُ يملأ الأماكنَ الجَميلَهْ  
يغني طوال اليوم فرحًا  
ويطيرُ بين الأشجار عاليًا.

reasons: The language used is simple and clear.
The vocabulary is suitable for young children.
The sentences are short and easy to understand.

details.note: No real Diwan model on this key, verse is the Fanar chat fallback.

findings.recommendation: Expose the Diwan model via API with a child reading-level / meter control; the chat fallback sometimes drifts to advanced vocabulary without tight prompting.

findings.name: oryx_arabic_rendering
findings.question: Did Oryx-IG render the target Arabic letter legibly?
findings.result: Asked Oryx-IG for the letter ص; Oryx-IVU read it back as: "ب" → NOT legible ✗
findings.recommendation: Oryx-IG is unreliable for exact Arabic letterforms, keep it to decorative art and render all reading text in the app's font layer (we already do).
